items.prompt: Use case: mobile cozy game collection album UI. Asset type: transparent PNG album card base. Primary request: one empty rounded vertical card made of Apple-like translucent frosted glass, soft white rim, subtle warm mint and sky reflections, empty center for future artwork, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no icon, no character, no object, no background, clean transparent corners.
